title: Device Settings - Settings screen for connected device
scenario: Device Settings screen displays correct tabs (Onboarding, User Guides, Fit Test, General, Language, etc.) when accessed via the "..." button in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is connected to the phone.
3. On the Home screen, locate the connected device card.
4. Tap the '...' (more options) button on the device card.
5. Observe the Device Settings screen that appears.
6. Verify the list of tabs displayed on the Device Settings screen.

7. Confirm the presence of the following tabs (note: tabs may vary by device model): Onboarding, User Guides, Quick Start Guide, Fit Test, General, Language, Ringtones & Volume, Sensor, Wireless, Advanced, Reset device, Software Update, Voice Prompts & Tones.
expected: The Device Settings screen displays the correct set of tabs appropriate for the connected headset model, including (as applicable): Onboarding, User Guides, Quick Start Guide, Fit Test, General, Language, Ringtones & Volume, Sensor, Wireless, Advanced, Reset device, Software Update, Voice Prompts & Tones.
